headline: Gartner Lawsuits Test Disclosure Practices And Perceived Undervaluation
summary: Multiple securities class action lawsuits have been filed against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) over alleged false or misleading statements on contract value and consulting segment growth rates. The complaints focus on disclosures made during a period of underperformance and share price pressure. Investors face new legal, reputational, and financial uncertainties as these cases progress. Gartner is a global research and consulting firm that advises enterprises on technology, data, and business...

headline: Semarchy Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management
summary: PHOENIX, April 09, 2026--Semarchy announced today that it has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management. We believe this recognition reflects the innovation Semarchy has achieved and the impact of the Semarchy Data Platform (SDP) — a converged data management platform that leverages DataOps and AI Data Engineering to design, govern, and deliver trusted data products at scale across operational, analytics, application, and AI use cases.
